ConstructorArguments: Shortcut to build a blit mode that copies the backbuffer first

Documentation.Summary: Shortcut to build a blit mode that copies the backbuffer first
The material to use for the blit.
We'll use this instead of BasePostProcess.Attributes if set.
Where to place this in the render pipeline
The order within the stage. Lower numbers get rendered first.
If true, the backbuffer will be copied to a texture called "ColorBuffer" before the blit.
If both WantsBackbuffer and this is true the backbuffer will be mipped after being copied.

ConstructorArguments: Adds an approximation of ambient occlusion using Screen Space Ambient Occlusion (SSAO). It darkens areas where ambient light is generally occluded from such as corners, crevices and surfaces that are close to each other.

ConstructorArguments: Applies same-frame multi-pass spatial denoising (dilated edge-aware blur). This smooths sampling noise without requiring previous frame history.

ConstructorArguments: Applies temporal denoising to reduce noise by averaging pixel values over multiple frames. This method leverages the temporal coherence of consecutive frames to achieve a noise-free result.
